title: OUTPATIENT TREATMENT AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER OUTPATIENT TREATMENT AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance use disorder treatment, medication assisted treatment, problem gambling treatment, mental health counseling, and community education. 1025 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 779-1282 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-1282 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts private insurances and OHP. Sliding-scale fees are available. DOCUMENTS: Drivers license or state ID card, proof of income, proof of insurance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Jackson, and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Gambling Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER
